title: Combinatorics
description: Master the art of counting without listing: permutations, combinations, the pigeonhole principle, inclusion-exclusion, and generating functions. From password security to the birthday paradox, discover why combinatorial thinking is the key to problem solving.
persona: For puzzle lovers and competition-math enthusiasts. No prerequisites beyond comfort with multiplication; each technique is built from scratch through interactive examples.
tagline: Count cleverly to avoid counting everything.
